cvData.name: SANISH BHAGAT
cvData.summary: AI/ML developer specializing in implementing Gen-AI in real world projects, multimodal AI, RAG-based LLM systems, andhealthcare AI applications. Experienced in building production-ready AI products with modern React frontends and scalabledeployments. Strong foundation in Problem Solving - DSA(C++), Machine Learning, Deep Learning.

education.degree: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering CGPA: 8.82 (1st + 2nd Year)

projects.title: Health Sathi — Multimodal AI Health Assistant | React, TypeScript, Google Gemini, RAG Live Link | GitHub
description: – Built a multimodal AI healthcare assistant supporting PDFs, images, and voice-based symptom analysis.
– Integrated Google Gemini 3 Flash and TTS models for medical reasoning, document understanding, and voice guidance.
– Implemented RAG-based medical grounding using a simulated clinical library to ensure hallucination-free responses.
– Designed a doctor triage dashboard for case prioritization with approve, modify, and escalate workflows.
– Enabled multilingual health guidance, offline report storage using IndexedDB, and PDF health assessment generation.

projects.title: Derma AI — AI Dermatology Assistant | Python, Flask, TensorFlow, React Live Link | GitHub
description: – Built an AI dermatology assistant capable of skin disease classification and medical Q&A.
– Implemented MobileNet-based CNN for skin disease prediction with confidence scoring.
– Developed a RAG pipeline using LangChain, Pinecone VectorDB, and Groq LLaMA-3 for contextual medical responses.
– Deployed a full-stack system using Vercel frontend and Docker-based backend on HuggingFace Spaces.

projects.title: AgroGuard — Plant Disease Detection | Python, CNN, Flask, TensorFlow GitHub
description: – Developed a tomato leaf disease classifier using CNNs and image preprocessing techniques.
– Integrated a Flask API for real-time disease prediction with treatment recommendations.
